_comment: Showcase carousel. Add or remove entries here and the site updates - nothing else to edit. 'type' is 'youtube' (use the 11-char video id) or 'mp4' (a file in docs/media/). Order here is the order on the page.

videos.title: Curve editor
videos.caption: Bezier graphs with envelopes, on any number sequence.

videos.title: 3D particles
videos.caption: Turn any part into a particle system.

videos.title: Local clip example
videos.caption: Drop an .mp4 in docs/media/ and reference it like this.
